label: Futures Table
description: Perpetual and dated futures with funding rate, basis, volume, and open interest per contract.

0.1.note: — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: — widget file does not import from lib/mocks/.

0.6.note: — context (options-data-context.tsx) exposes no isLoading field; data is mock-generated synchronously; loading state cannot be wired at widget level without context changes.

0.7.note: — added empty guard: futureRows.length === 0 renders a message; non-crypto case already renders informational text.

0.8.note: — context exposes no error field; error state cannot be wired at widget level without context changes.

l0.notes: 0.1 pass — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 pass — requiredEntitlements: ['options-trading']. 0.3 pass — availableOn: ['options']. 0.4 pass — no any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 pass — widget file does not import from lib/mocks/. 0.6 finding — context (options-data-context.tsx) exposes no isLoading field; data is mock-generated synchronously; loading state cannot be wired at widget level without context changes. 0.7 fix — added empty guard: futureRows.length === 0 renders a message; non-crypto case already renders informational text. 0.8 finding — context exposes no error field; error state cannot be wired at widget level without context changes. 0.9 pass — no dead code.

1.1.note: — widget reads futureRows, isCrypto, asset, setSelectedInstrument, setSelectedFuture exclusively from useOptionsData().

1.2.note: — options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130); scopedWatchlists filtered by globalScope.organizationIds.

1.3.note: — org filter changes scopedWatchlists in context; asset data filtered via organizationIds check.

1.4.note: — no client filter applicable to futures table rows.

1.5.note: — no strategy filter applicable to futures table.

1.6.note: — empty organizationIds array in globalScope returns all DEFAULT_WATCHLISTS (context line 275 condition).

1.7.note: — ASSETS, SPOT_PRICES, EXPIRY_DATES constants live in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock (reference data; L1.7 flags data that should move to lib/constants — this is mock fixture data, acceptable for current stage).

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — widget reads futureRows, isCrypto, asset, setSelectedInstrument, setSelectedFuture exclusively from useOptionsData(). 1.2 pass — options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130); scopedWatchlists filtered by globalScope.organizationIds. 1.3 pass — org filter changes scopedWatchlists in context; asset data filtered via organizationIds check. 1.4 N/A — no client filter applicable to futures table rows. 1.5 N/A — no strategy filter applicable to futures table. 1.6 pass — empty organizationIds array in globalScope returns all DEFAULT_WATCHLISTS (context line 275 condition). 1.7 pass — ASSETS, SPOT_PRICES, EXPIRY_DATES constants live in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock (reference data; L1.7 flags data that should move to lib/constants — this is mock fixture data, acceptable for current stage).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

knownIssues: context does not expose isLoading or error fields — loading/error states at widget level require context update
FuturesTab sub-component imports directly from lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock (outside widget file scope)
findings: 0.6 — isLoading: context has no loading field; synchronous mock data generation means no async loading path exists
0.8 — error: context has no error field; error propagation from data layer not wired
